title: GPS Tracker
description: A web application that allows users to track their location in real-time using the Geolocation API. The application can display the user's current location on a map, provide directions to a specified destination, and allow users to save their favorite locations for quick access. This project can be useful for individuals who want to keep track of their whereabouts or share their location with friends and family.
tech: Google Maps API or Leaflet.js for map integration
Local Storage for saving favorite locations
